title: A Sky That Remembers Magic
body:
The image shows a breathtaking night sky filled with deep shades of blue and glowing light. A bright, radiant horizon stretches across the center, illuminating the clouds with a soft, ethereal glow. Several shooting stars streak downward from the sky, leaving thin, colorful trails behind them.

In the foreground, the silhouette of a dragon glides gracefully through the air, its wings spread wide as it flies toward the glowing light. The atmosphere feels magical and calm, with faint lens-like light orbs floating around, adding a dreamy effect. The entire scene has a fantasy, almost otherworldly mood, as if it captures a moment from a mythical world.

only works with optifine mode
